case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. JASON LOOMIS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY; RE: LOSS OF ORIGINAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOOMIS, JASON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 44 MCALLISTER STREET, #828, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LOOMIS, JASON
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT PREJUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SERVED MAR-17-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LOOMIS, JASON
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.23 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LOOMIS, JASON DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LOOMIS, JASON
